trails.name: Anaura Bay Walkway
trails.description: This track passes through coastal forest, pine-clad valleys and dense native bush - with a fairly easy grade it's suitable for children, although some climbing is required and there are a few steep places.

trails.name: Okitu Bush Scenic Reserve Walk
trails.description: This easy track through native bush has creeks for kids to explore and a grassy picnic area close to the car park - it's a great option for families.

trails.name: Te Kuri Farm Walkway
trails.description: Enjoy panoramic views from various points on this track, as well as from a lookout point at the top (290 m).

trails.name: Cooks Cove Walkway
trails.description: Use of this walkway has been made possible through the generous permission of the landowners, Hauiti Incorporation. Respect the property, do not disturb or approach farm animals and leave gates as you find them.
